scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --filter "!./artifacts/haulbrokr-mobile" --if-present run build
scripts.check:api-codegen: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen && git diff --exit-code -- lib/api-client-react/src lib/api-zod/src lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml
scripts.lint: prettier --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json .github/workflows/ci.yml docs/ENGINEERING_STATUS.md --ignore-unknown
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
